---
title: "Software"
description: "Open-source R, Python, and Julia packages for causal inference, econometrics, and statistical computing."
---

Software packages for applied econometrics and data analysis.

## R Packages

| Package | Focus | GitHub | Docs |
|---|---|---|---|
| `lwdidR` | Panel difference-in-differences estimator using Lee-Wooldridge unit-specific pre-treatment transformations. | [GitHub](https://github.com/xiangao/lwdidR) | [Docs](https://xiangao.github.io/lwdidR/) |
| `endid` | Distributional difference-in-differences with engression for ATT, QTE, and counterfactual distributions. | [GitHub](https://github.com/xiangao/endid) | [Docs](https://xiangao.github.io/endid/) |
| `Rnetrics` | R port of Bryan Graham's dyadic regression tools with bias-corrected dyadic-robust standard errors. | [GitHub](https://github.com/xiangao/Rnetrics) | - |
| `Rfrengression` | Causal data simulation with deep generative models and interventional sampling. | [GitHub](https://github.com/xiangao/Rfrengression) | [Docs](https://xiangao.github.io/Rfrengression/) |
| `RCausalModel` | Causal estimators for experiments, observational studies, and network interference settings. | [GitHub](https://github.com/xiangao/RCausalModel) | [Docs](https://xiangao.github.io/RCausalModel/) |
| `dma` | Distributional mediation analysis with energy regression and Riesz-representer weighting. | [GitHub](https://github.com/xiangao/dma) | [Docs](https://xiangao.github.io/dma/) |
| `divR` | Distributional instrumental-variable regression for interventional distributions under unmeasured confounding. | [GitHub](https://github.com/xiangao/divR) | [Docs](https://xiangao.github.io/divR/) |
| `dyadfast` | Fast dyadic-robust variance estimation using a single scatter-add pass. | [GitHub](https://github.com/xiangao/dyadfast) | - |
| `didint` | Doubly robust difference-in-differences with spatial interference and Conley-style inference options. | [GitHub](https://github.com/xiangao/didint) | [Docs](https://xiangao.github.io/didint/) |
| `tvhte` | Time-varying heterogeneous treatment effects in event studies with empirical-Bayes posterior trajectories. | [GitHub](https://github.com/xiangao/tvhte) | [Docs](https://xiangao.github.io/tvhte/) |

## Python Packages

| Package | Focus | GitHub | Docs |
|---|---|---|---|
| `torch-engression` | GPU-accelerated distributional regression with energy scores in PyTorch. | [GitHub](https://github.com/xiangao/torch-engression) | [Docs](https://xiangao.github.io/torch-engression/) |
| `torch-endid` | GPU-accelerated distributional difference-in-differences built on `torch-engression`. | [GitHub](https://github.com/xiangao/torch-endid) | [Docs](https://xiangao.github.io/torch-endid/) |
| `netrics-fast` | Memory-efficient dyadic regression with chunked Hajek-projection variance estimation. | [GitHub](https://github.com/xiangao/netrics-fast) | - |

## Julia Packages

| Package | Focus | GitHub | Docs |
|---|---|---|---|
| `TASC.jl` | Time-Aware Synthetic Control with low-rank state-space models, Kalman filtering, EM, and confidence bands. | [GitHub](https://github.com/xiangao/TASC.jl) | [Docs](https://xiangao.github.io/TASC.jl/) |
| `MSC.jl` | Multivariate synthetic control for high-dimensional panels with diagnostics, placebo routines, and plotting. | [GitHub](https://github.com/xiangao/MSC.jl) | [Docs](https://xiangao.github.io/MSC.jl/) |
| `SynthDiD.jl` | Julia implementation of synthetic difference-in-differences, synthetic control, and DiD estimators. | [GitHub](https://github.com/xiangao/SynthDiD.jl) | [Docs](https://xiangao.github.io/SynthDiD.jl/) |
| `Engression.jl` | Distributional regression via energy scores for full conditional-distribution estimation. | [GitHub](https://github.com/xiangao/Engression.jl) | - |
| `Endid.jl` | Distributional difference-in-differences with engression for treatment-effect distributions. | [GitHub](https://github.com/xiangao/Endid.jl) | [Docs](https://xiangao.github.io/Endid.jl/) |
| `CausalEstimate.jl` | Unified front end for typed causal estimands with TMLE, AIPW, cross-fitting, and graph adjustment. | [GitHub](https://github.com/xiangao/CausalEstimate.jl) | [Docs](https://xiangao.github.io/CausalEstimate.jl/) |
| `Panelest.jl` | High-performance panel estimation with absorbed fixed effects and event-study treatment-effect tools. | [GitHub](https://github.com/xiangao/Panelest.jl) | [Docs](https://xiangao.github.io/Panelest.jl/) |
| `Lavaan.jl` | Julia port of `lavaan` for CFA, SEM, latent-growth, generalized SEM, and multilevel models. | [GitHub](https://github.com/xiangao/Lavaan.jl) | [Docs](https://xiangao.github.io/Lavaan.jl/) |
| `Crumble.jl` | Causal mediation analysis with cross-fitted nuisance estimation and optimal-transport instruments. | [GitHub](https://github.com/xiangao/Crumble.jl) | [Docs](https://xiangao.github.io/Crumble.jl/) |
| `RDRobust.jl` | Regression-discontinuity point estimation, robust bias-corrected intervals, bandwidths, and RD plots. | [GitHub](https://github.com/xiangao/RDRobust.jl) | - |
| `CausalGraphs.jl` | Graph-based causal identification and estimation for ADMGs, missingness DAGs, and common adjustment strategies. | [GitHub](https://github.com/xiangao/CausalGraphs.jl) | [Docs](https://xiangao.github.io/CausalGraphs.jl/) |
| `DidInterference.jl` | Julia port of `didint` for doubly robust DiD with spatial interference. | [GitHub](https://github.com/xiangao/DidInterference.jl) | [Docs](https://xiangao.github.io/DidInterference.jl/) |
| `TVHTE.jl` | Julia port of `tvhte` for dynamic heterogeneous treatment effects in event studies. | [GitHub](https://github.com/xiangao/TVHTE.jl) | [Docs](https://xiangao.github.io/TVHTE.jl/) |
| `ShiftShareIV.jl` | Shift-share IV tools including Bartik instruments, Rotemberg weights, and shock-level aggregation. | [GitHub](https://github.com/xiangao/ShiftShareIV.jl) | [Docs](https://xiangao.github.io/ShiftShareIV.jl/) |
